subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-14
subcodes.first_line: When I was very young I was travelling with Bahá'u'lláh and my family. We reached the city of Kermanshahan. Here we took quarters in a Caravanserai.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @wealth inequality and its moderation
